summary: Iteration 7 Vercel deployment clean-fix verification: ALL 11 critical checks PASS. npm ci exits 0 with no --legacy-peer-deps, both CI=false and CI=true builds succeed, ajv@6 (top-level) and ajv@8 (nested under schema-utils) coexist automatically via npm default hoisting, frontend dev server serves 200 and preview URL renders ID9 landing page with 0 console errors.

checks_performed.package_json_clean: PASS — no 'overrides', no 'resolutions', no 'ajv' dep. engines.node='>=20.0.0 <23.0.0'. react-day-picker@^9.5.0, date-fns@^3.6.0.
checks_performed.lockfile_state: PASS — package-lock.json present (781KB), no yarn.lock, no .npmrc, .nvmrc=20.
checks_performed.npm_ci: PASS — exit 0, installed 1519 packages in 34s, no peer-dep blocking errors. Only npm warn deprecated notices (transitive, non-blocking).
checks_performed.build_CI_false: PASS — exit 0, build/ contains index.html, static/js, static/css, asset-manifest.json, robots.txt, sitemap.xml.
checks_performed.build_CI_true: PASS — exit 0 (Vercel default mode). No 'Cannot find module ajv/dist/compile/codegen' error.
checks_performed.vercel_json: PASS — installCommand='npm ci', buildCommand='npm run vercel-build', framework='create-react-app', build.env.CI='false'. Zero yarn references.
checks_performed.craco_forkts_filter: PASS — ForkTsCheckerWebpackPlugin filter preserved on lines 44-46 of craco.config.js.
checks_performed.frontend_supervisor: PASS — RUNNING, http://localhost:3000/ returns HTTP 200 after restart (needed post rm -rf node_modules).
checks_performed.preview_url_loads: PASS — https://digital-impact-19.preview.emergentagent.com renders ID9_AGENCY landing page ('Be Impactful. Build Unforgettable Digital Brands.') with 0 console errors.

npm_audit_note: 31 vulnerabilities (11 low, 7 moderate, 13 high) — all transitive from CRA5, expected and non-blocking per user directive.
critical_code_review_comments: Clean fix is architecturally sound: root cause (react-day-picker@8 requiring React<19 + date-fns@2||3, conflicting with React 19 + date-fns@4) is properly addressed by upgrading react-day-picker to v9 and downgrading date-fns to v3.6. This lets npm's default nested-resolution place ajv@6 top-level and ajv@8 under schema-utils@4 automatically.
craco.config.js ForkTsCheckerWebpackPlugin filter is a legitimate code-level fix for a JS-only project (avoids pulling legacy ajv-keywords@3 dep chain). Well-commented on lines 41-43.

src/components/ui/calendar.jsx is unused shadcn boilerplate still using v8 API — no build impact since not imported. Optional cleanup: either delete or migrate to react-day-picker v9 API for consistency.
Consider addressing the 13 high-severity npm audit warnings in a future maintenance pass (CRA5 upgrade or migrate to Vite), though non-blocking.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Vercel deployment fix is verified stable. npm ci + npm run build both work clean on Node 20 with no manual dep overrides. If deploying to Vercel: set Node version to 20.x in Vercel project settings. package-lock.json must be committed. Do NOT re-introduce ajv/overrides/resolutions/yarn.
